name: Polygonal Garbs
description: Notes Part of the Cuboid Necromancer Set.
effects: With full set: Squarrier deals twice the damage and lasts twice as long

On Taking Damage while In Combat: Cast a squarrier of projectiles that move outward and lingers Cooldown: 2 seconds Damage: 400 / 800 Speed: 0 tiles/second Lifetime: 2 / 4 seconds Amplitude: 3.54 tile(s) Frequency: 2 / 4 cycle(s)/shot Shots hit multiple targets Shots pass through obstacles Ignores defense of target
